items.title: Zayn Malik cancels US tour and cuts UK dates after hospital bed photo shared
items.dek: The former One Direction singer has taken to Instagram to update fans as he cuts his world tour dates
items.body: The former One Direction singer has taken to Instagram to update fans as he cuts his world tour dates
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Turkish police arrest more than 500 people at May Day rallies
items.dek: Turkey sees significant police deployments on 1 May each year, when marches led by workers and unions are held.
items.body: Turkey sees significant police deployments on 1 May each year, when marches led by workers and unions are held.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Israeli police arrest man after nun attacked in Jerusalem
items.dek: The French nun was pushed over and kicked in the apparently unprovoked assault, amid a rise in harassment of Christians in the city by Jewish extremists.
items.body: The French nun was pushed over and kicked in the apparently unprovoked assault, amid a rise in harassment of Christians in the city by Jewish extremists.
items.author: IriLine Desk
